title: The harness shrinks to meet the model
subtitle: Every gate encodes a model weakness. When the model outgrows the weakness, the gate becomes dead weight and comes out.
caption: Illustrative; the documented step is Opus 4.5 to 4.6. Once the newer model stopped needing them, Anthropic removed context resets and sprint decomposition, and a leaner harness ran a full audio workstation for $124 against the older $200 run.
